---
title: "15 MR Causal Inference Analysis"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
library(tidyverse)
library(TwoSampleMR)

# Global Parameters
ld_r2 <- 0.001

# Data Import
# Import gene exposure dataset and HFrEF outcome dataset

# Data Analysis
# 1. SNP filtering and linkage disequilibrium pruning
# 2. Causal estimation via IVW, MR-Egger and weighted median methods
# 3. Heterogeneity test and horizontal pleiotropy test
# 4. Sensitivity analysis

# Visualization
# Scatter plot, forest plot, funnel plot

# Result Export
# Output MR causal inference statistical table

# Result Description
# Explain MR parameters and evidence grading standards
